Text:  RULE OF LAW YANI HUKUKUN ÜSTÜNLÜĞÜ PUANI SIFIR EKSI SIFIR

OF 0.2800 0.5000 0.9480
LAW 0.5000 0.7200 0.8220
YANI 0.7200 1.0400 0.8600
